name: Cuban Black Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Sort the beans.
2. Soak overnight in water to cover.
3. Drain and discard the soak water.
4. In a (4 quart) pot, sauté the onions in butter until tender but not browned.
5. Add the soaked beans, water, beef bouillon cube, diced ham, bay leaves, thyme, oregano, salt, and red pepper to the pot.
6. Bring to a boil.
7. Reduce heat.
8. Cover and simmer until the beans are tender (1-1 1/2 hours).
9. Remove 1 cup of the beans for serving (adjust as required).
10. Mash the removed beans with a potato masher or fork.
11. Return the mashed beans to the soup.
12. Stir thoroughly.
13. Remove and discard the bay leaves and red pepper.
14. Add the green bell pepper and dark rum.
15. Cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
